data.name: Monster Girls Escapade
data.detailed_description:
A wild Encounter

Deep within a lush, secluded wilderness lives Eostre, a playful bunny girl who has made this place her burrow. She is as elusive as she is charming (and perhaps a bit crazy). She's been waiting for a partner worthy of her games... and she doesn't plan on making it easy for you.

Master the Hunt

She is fast, agile, and lives for the thrill of the chase. To corner this bunny, you'll need to be more than just quick : you'll need to be cunning enough to outsmart her, and stealthy enough to close the gap before she even notices you're here.

Build Trust

The more you catch her, the more she'll want to be caught. Building trust is the key to unlocking spicier interactions, both in the game you play together and in the "stuff" that happens after.

Key features:

Use covers to navigate unseen and catch her off guard.

Get creative, set traps and lures to ambush her.

Unlock lots of spicy scenes specific to how and where you catch the girl.

But be careful, if she spots you, the real chase begins. And if she outruns you, she will do with you as she pleases…

All scenes are fully scripted and include "immersive SFX" (Fancy way of saying there are moans and other weird sex noises).

You can experience the sex scene in first-person POV for total immersion, or take control with a free camera that lets you capture the perfect view of the girl, from head to paws

data.short_description: She's fast, she's horny and she's leading you in playful games you won't forget. Outsmart our sexy bunny girl to unlock spicy 18+ rewards. But be careful! If you let her escape, you'll be the one getting used. So hide and get crafty, as she won't let herself be caught easily.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 日文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-10400 / AMD Ryzen 5 3600
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA RTX 2060 / AMD RX 5700
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX Compatible
  • VR 支援: N/A
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 64bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7-12700 / AMD Ryzen 7 5800X
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA RTX 3070 / AMD RX 6700 XT
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX Compatible
  • VR 支援: N/A
